questions.question: Given a normal distribution with mean (μ) = 5 and standard deviation (σ) = 2, find its mean and variance. Calculate the z-score for a value X = 7. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the formulae: μ = μ, σ² = σ², z = (X - μ) / σ

questions.question: A random variable X follows a binomial distribution with parameters n = 10 and p = 0.5. Find the mean and variance of X. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the formulae: E(X) = np, Var(X) = np(1-p)

questions.question: Calculate the variance of a random variable X that follows a uniform distribution on the interval [0, 10]. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the formula: Var(X) = (b-a)² / 12, where a = 0 and b = 10
